description: The hospital IT department has announced an emergency network maintenance window for tomorrow, meaning the OpenClinica EDC system will be inaccessible to clinic staff. Patient visits cannot be canceled, so you must execute the site's Downtime Contingency Plan by saving printable blank CRFs to use as paper source documents. Using the OpenClinica system (login: root / Admin123!, active study: Phase II Diabetes Trial), upload the 'Vital Signs' CRF template from /home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls. Export a properly paginated and formatted printable version (HTML or PDF) of the blank Vital Signs CRF to ~/Documents/Downtime_Forms. Screenshots or raw text dumps are not acceptable.
